title: epipactis thunbergii var. manshurica
intro: Epipactis thunbergii var. manshurica, also known as the Far Eastern Helleborine, is a type of orchid that is native to East Asia and is characterized by its pale yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. Consuming the plant has been associated with several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
